title: Low Fat Chicken French Bowl
description: A healthier twist on classic French cuisine, this dish features lean chicken breast served in a light and flavorful sauce over a bed of quinoa and steamed vegetables.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the sauce by combining the chicken broth, French onion soup mix (if using), and low-fat milk (if using) in a small saucepan.
Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat and cook until heated through.
Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of cooked quinoa on a plate, top with a slice of chicken, and spoon the sauce over the top.
